tree.statement: 这是一篇在毕业典礼上的致辞发言。
tree.explanation: 文章开头向“Ladies and gentlemen”打招呼，并提到“attend the graduation ceremony”，属于毕业演讲。

children.text: Thank you for coming today to attend the graduation ceremony at No. 3 Junior High School.
children.cn: 感谢你们今天来参加第三初级中学的毕业典礼。
children.statement: 毕业典礼是在第一初级中学举行的。
children.explanation: 典礼是在 No. 3 Junior High School（第三初级中学）举行。
children.notes: thank you for doing 因某事感谢某人；attend 参加；ceremony 典礼

children.text: First of all, I'd like to congratulate all the students who are here today.
children.cn: 首先，我想向今天在这里的所有学生表示祝贺。
children.statement: “first of all” 的意思是“首先”。
children.explanation: first of all 是常用短语，表示首先、第一。
children.notes: first of all 首先；congratulate 祝贺

children.text: I remember meeting all of you when you were just starting Grade 7 at this school.
children.cn: 我记得在你们刚在这所学校开始上七年级时遇见你们的情景。
children.statement: 发言人记得学生们刚入学时的情景。
children.explanation: 作者用 I remember meeting you 表达了对学生入学时的会议。
children.notes: remember meeting 记得曾遇到过

children.text: You were all so full of energy and thirsty for knowledge.
children.cn: 你们那时都是如此充满活力，渴望知识。
children.statement: “thirsty for knowledge” 意思是学生们对知识充满渴望。
children.explanation: be thirsty for 表示渴望，如饥似渴地追求知识。
children.notes: full of 充满；thirsty for 渴望

children.text: Although you've all worked very hard over the last three years, none of you did it alone.
children.cn: 虽然在过去的三年里你们都工作得非常努力，但你们没有一个人是独自完成的。
children.statement: 虽然学生们学习很刻苦，但他们得到了很多人的支持。
children.explanation: none of you did it alone 意思是没有人是孤立无援的，大家都得到了支持。
children.notes: Although 虽然；none 没有一个

children.text: I hope you'll remember the important people in your lives who helped and supported you—your parents, your teachers and your friends.
children.cn: 我希望你们能记住生命中帮助和支持过你们的重要人物——你们的父母、老师和朋友。
children.statement: 学生应该感谢父母、老师和朋友。
children.explanation: 文中列举了父母、老师和朋友作为支持者的代表。

children.text: Never fail to be thankful to the people around you.
children.cn: 永远不要忘记感激你身边的那些人。
children.statement: “Never fail to be...” 意思是“绝不要忘记做……”。
children.explanation: fail to do 意为未能做某事，双重否定 never fail to 表示“务必、永远不要忘记”。
children.notes: fail to do 未能做某事；thankful 感激的

children.text: Lastly, the end of junior high school is the beginning of a new life.
children.cn: 最后，初中生活的结束是一个新生活的开始。
children.statement: 初中结束代表学业的终结，以后不再学习了。
children.explanation: 初中结束是新生活的开始 (the beginning of a new life)。

children.text: I don't need to tell you that life in senior high school will be harder and that you have many difficult tasks ahead of you.
children.cn: 我不需要告诉你们高中的生活将会更加艰难，在你们的前方有许多艰难的任务。
children.statement: 高中的学习任务会比初中更加轻松。
children.explanation: 演讲中提到高中生活将更加艰难 (harder)，有更难的任务 (difficult tasks)。
children.notes: senior high 高中；ahead of 在……前面

children.text: You'll make mistakes along the way, but the key is to learn from your mistakes and never give up.
children.cn: 在行进的道路上你会犯错误，但关键是从错误中学习并且永不放弃。
children.statement: 犯错没关系，关键是从中汲取教训并坚持下去。
children.explanation: “learn from your mistakes and never give up” 是成功的关键。
children.notes: make mistakes 犯错；give up 放弃

children.text: Behind each door you open are chances to learn new things, and you have the ability to make your own choices.
children.cn: 在你打开的每一扇门后面都是学习新事物的机会，并且你有能力做出你自己的选择。
children.statement: 学生们没有权利和能力自己做选择。
children.explanation: 演讲说学生有能力做自己的选择 (have the ability to make your own choices)。
children.notes: chance 机会；ability 能力；make choices 做出选择

children.text: As you set out on your new journey, you shouldn't forget where you came from.
children.cn: 在你们开始新的旅程时，你不应该忘记你来自何处。
children.statement: 毕业后，学生们应该忘掉过去，永远不回头。
children.explanation: As you set out... you shouldn't forget where you came from 意为不要忘记母校和起点。
children.notes: set out on 开始进行；journey 旅程，阶段

children.statement: 未来掌握在学生们自己手中。
children.explanation: “The future is yours” 指未来属于你们，由你们创造。
